title: NASA Mars Rover Discovers Ancient Lakebed Evidence
text: NASA's Perseverance rover has uncovered geological evidence of an ancient lakebed on Mars. Chemical analyses of soil samples collected from the Jezero Crater confirm high concentrations of clay minerals and salts, indicating that liquid water persisted on the surface for thousands of years. Scientists believe this lakebed was once a habitable environment suitable for micro-organic life.

title: Solid-State Battery Breakthrough Doubles EV Range
text: A major automotive research laboratory has successfully developed a prototype solid-state lithium battery. By replacing the liquid electrolyte with a proprietary sulfide-based ceramic material, the battery achieves double the energy density of current commercial cells. Road testing demonstrated a driving range of over 800 miles on a single charge with zero degradation after 500 charge cycles.
